stock_market.summary: Market consolidation continues with focus on Q2 positioning following the end of March. Investors are monitoring yield movements.

key_metrics.impact: Volatility in Treasuries and continued tech accumulation; monitoring yield movements.

art_market.summary: Art market maintains focus on blue-chip and provenance-heavy assets with Q2 auction preparations underway.

key_metrics.major_events: Q2 auction preparations; focus on established, high-end works.
